# daytona_sandbox_ssh_access_validation (Data Source)

Validates a Daytona sandbox SSH access token.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_sandbox_ssh_access_validation" "example" {
  token = "ssh-access-token"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `token` (String, Sensitive) SSH access token to validate.

### Optional

- `request_organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID to send as `X-Daytona-Organization-ID`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `sandbox_id` (String) Sandbox ID for the SSH access token.
- `valid` (Boolean) Whether the SSH access token is valid.
